request.description: Redesign multi-persona app into next-gen direct chatbot with expanded model support and image generation
request.prdContent:
# Requirements Document

## 1. Application Overview

### 1.1 Application Name
Next-Gen Multi-AI Chat Platform

### 1.2 Application Description
A modern AI chatbot platform with direct chat interface similar to ChatGPT, Kai, and Gemini. Users can chat with multiple AI models simultaneously, add friends or anonymous contacts, generate images, and interact through a clean, engaging interface with no onboarding screens.

## 2. Users & Usage Scenarios

### 2.1 Target Users
- Users seeking direct AI chat experiences without complex setup
- Users wanting to compare responses from multiple AI models
- Users interested in AI-powered image generation
- Users preferring simple, intuitive chat interfaces

### 2.2 Core Usage Scenarios
- Direct chatting with AI models immediately upon app launch
- Switching between different AI models during conversation
- Adding friends or anonymous contacts for chat
- Generating images through AI within chat conversations
- Sending images as input to AI models
- Managing multiple AI model API keys

## 3. Page Structure & Functionality

```
Next-Gen Multi-AI Chat Platform
├── Main Chat Interface
│   ├── Chat View
│   ├── Model Selector
│   ├── Add Friend/Anonymous Option
│   └── Image Input/Output Area
├── API Key Management Modal
└── Settings Panel
```

### 3.1 Main Chat Interface
**Purpose:** Primary interaction space for direct AI conversations

**Core Functions:**
- Display chat messages in clean, modern interface similar to ChatGPT
- Send text messages to AI
- Upload and send images as input to AI models
- View AI-generated images inline within chat
- Access model selector dropdown to switch AI models
- Add friend or anonymous contact option within chat
- Display current active AI model name
- Show stickers and photos in chat responses
- Support rich media display: images, stickers, GIFs

**Model Selector:**
- Dropdown menu showing all available AI models
- Supported models include:
  - GPT-4, GPT-3.5-turbo
  - Gemini 2.5 Flash, Gemini Pro
  - Groq Llama 3 8B, Groq Mixtral
  - Claude 3 Opus, Claude 3 Sonnet
  - All models available in Kai9000 open source app
- One-click model switching during conversation
- Visual indicator of currently selected model

**Add Friend/Anonymous:**
- Button to add friend or anonymous contact
- Simple contact addition without complex setup
- Contacts appear in chat list

**Image Input/Output:**
- Upload button for sending images to AI
- Display AI-generated images inline
- Support image generation via Nano Banana API

### 3.2 API Key Management Modal
**Purpose:** Simplified API key input and management

**Core Functions:**
- Add API keys for all supported models
- Simple input fields with model labels
- Automatic prompt configuration for each model
- Save and validate API keys
- Edit or delete existing keys
- Clear error messages if key validation fails
- No complex setup process

**Supported API Keys:**
- OpenAI API key
- Google Gemini API key
- Groq API key
- Anthropic Claude API key
- Nano Banana API key for image generation
- All model API keys supported by Kai9000

### 3.3 Settings Panel
**Purpose:** Basic application configuration

**Core Functions:**
- Access API key management
- Configure default AI model
- Adjust chat display preferences
- Manage contact list

## 4. Business Rules & Logic

### 4.1 Direct Chat Experience
- App launches directly into chat interface with no onboarding screens
- Users can start chatting immediately with default AI model
- No early understanding or tutorial screens
- Clean, modern UI similar to ChatGPT, Kai, Gemini

### 4.2 Multi-Model Support
- Users can switch between AI models at any time during conversation
- Each model uses its own API key
- Automatic prompt configuration for each model based on Kai9000 approach
- If one AI model fails to respond, user can switch to another model
- All models from Kai9000 open source app are supported

### 4.3 API Key Management
- Simplified API key addition process
- Clear error messages if API key fails validation
- Users must add at least one valid API key to use chat features
- API keys stored securely
- Automatic prompt setup when API key is added

### 4.4 Image Generation & Input
- Image generation powered by Nano Banana API
- Users can request image generation within chat
- Users can upload images as input to AI models
- Generated images display inline in chat
- Uploaded images are sent to AI for analysis or response

### 4.5 Contact System
- Users can add friends or anonymous contacts
- Simple addition process without complex verification
- Contacts appear in chat interface
- Switch between AI chat and contact chat

### 4.6 Rich Media Support
- AI responses can include stickers, photos, GIFs
- Media displays inline within chat
- Contextually relevant media responses

## 5. Exception & Boundary Cases

| Scenario | Handling |
|----------|----------|
| API key validation fails | Display clear error message, allow user to re-enter key |
| No API keys configured | Prompt user to add API key before chatting |
| AI model fails to respond | Display error, suggest switching to different model |
| Image generation fails | Show error message, allow retry |
| Image upload fails | Display upload error, allow retry |
| Invalid image format uploaded | Show format error, list supported formats |
| Nano Banana API unavailable | Notify user, disable image generation temporarily |
| Network connection lost | Display connection error, allow retry when reconnected |
| Contact addition fails | Show error message, allow retry |

## 6. Acceptance Criteria

1. App launches directly into chat interface with no onboarding screens
2. Users can add API keys for GPT, Gemini, Groq, Claude, and Nano Banana
3. API key addition process is simple with clear error messages
4. Users can switch between all supported AI models via dropdown selector
5. Chat interface resembles ChatGPT, Kai, and Gemini in design and usability
6. Users can upload images as input to AI models
7. Users can generate images via Nano Banana API within chat
8. Generated images display inline in chat messages
9. Users can add friends or anonymous contacts
10. AI responses include stickers, photos, and GIFs
11. Automatic prompt configuration works for all supported models
12. If one AI model fails, users can switch to another model
13. All models from Kai9000 open source app are available
14. UI is modern, clean, and engaging with no boring elements
15. No early understanding or tutorial screens present

## 7. Out of Scope for Current Release

- Voice input/output functionality
- Video call features
- Real-time translation
- Advanced analytics dashboard
- Blockchain integration
- Multi-user group chats with human participants
- Persona marketplace
- Mobile native applications
- Offline mode
- Advanced content moderation tools
- Social media sharing features
- Conversation export functionality
- Memory import from other AI services
- Persona creation and management
- Group chat configurations
- Emotional state tracking for AI responses
